# flaky-tests v0.1.0 — first project-level snapshot

This is the first **repo-level** release of flaky-tests. It is a snapshot
that pins together the seven independently-versioned npm packages already
published from commit [`cd5cced`](https://github.com/brewpirate/flaky-tests/commit/cd5cced6980a57f37129beae6e90674941d50ecc).

No new code is published as part of this tag — every package below has
already shipped to npm and JSR. The purpose of this release is to give the
project a single, citable "v0.1.0" anchor that aggregates the per-package
changelogs into one human-readable summary.

## Packages in this snapshot

| Package | Version | Per-package release |
|---|---|---|
| `@flaky-tests/core` | **1.0.0** | [release](https://github.com/brewpirate/flaky-tests/releases/tag/%40flaky-tests%2Fcore%401.0.0) |
| `@flaky-tests/plugin-bun` | 0.1.1 | [release](https://github.com/brewpirate/flaky-tests/releases/tag/%40flaky-tests%2Fplugin-bun%400.1.1) |
| `@flaky-tests/plugin-vitest` | 0.1.1 | [release](https://github.com/brewpirate/flaky-tests/releases/tag/%40flaky-tests%2Fplugin-vitest%400.1.1) |
| `@flaky-tests/store-sqlite` | 0.1.1 | [release](https://github.com/brewpirate/flaky-tests/releases/tag/%40flaky-tests%2Fstore-sqlite%400.1.1) |
| `@flaky-tests/store-turso` | 0.1.1 | [release](https://github.com/brewpirate/flaky-tests/releases/tag/%40flaky-tests%2Fstore-turso%400.1.1) |
| `@flaky-tests/store-postgres` | 0.1.1 | [release](https://github.com/brewpirate/flaky-tests/releases/tag/%40flaky-tests%2Fstore-postgres%400.1.1) |
| `@flaky-tests/store-supabase` | 0.1.1 | [release](https://github.com/brewpirate/flaky-tests/releases/tag/%40flaky-tests%2Fstore-supabase%400.1.1) |

## Highlights

### `@flaky-tests/core` 1.0.0 — CLI merge (breaking)

The standalone `@flaky-tests/cli` package has been merged into
`@flaky-tests/core`. The detection CLI now ships as the `flaky-tests` bin
from `@flaky-tests/core`, and the helpers (`generatePrompt`, `generateHtml`,
`createIssue`, `findExistingIssue`, `resolveRepo`, `copyToClipboard`) are
exported from `@flaky-tests/core/cli`. `@flaky-tests/cli` will be deprecated
on npm with a pointer to core.

**Migration:**

```diff
- bunx @flaky-tests/cli
+ bunx @flaky-tests/core
```

```diff
# package.json
- "@flaky-tests/cli": "^0.1.0"
+ "@flaky-tests/core": "^1.0.0"
```

### Node + Vitest support without Bun (#73)

`@flaky-tests/store-sqlite` no longer requires Bun — it works under Node
with Vitest projects, dropping the previous core Bun coupling. This is the
unlock for non-Bun adopters using the Vitest reporter against a local
SQLite store.

### Internal refactor pass (issue #68)

A four-PR refactor series tightened the internal structure without
changing public APIs:

- `src/` reorganized into subdirectories with a `#core/*` path alias (#69)
- DRY consolidations across stores (#70)
- Shared `StoreError` wrapper for adapter error normalization (#71)
- Shared payload helpers across the Bun and Vitest plugins (#74)
- Shared SQL extraction between the SQLite and Turso stores (#77)

### Documentation

- HTML report deduplicated via the new `listFailures` primitive (#67)
- Public API surfaces across stores and core gained `@throws` documentation (#62, #63)
- Reference docs and README refreshed for recent feature PRs (#54)

### Release infrastructure

- `release.yml` split into a build job + parallel npm/JSR publish jobs (#79)
- Versioned schema migrations for SQLite + Turso (#53)
- Retry-with-backoff for network store reads (#51)
- Biome rules backing the `.claude/rules` guidelines enabled (#61)

## Install (Bun preload — most common path)

```sh
bun add -d @flaky-tests/core @flaky-tests/plugin-bun @flaky-tests/store-sqlite
```

`bunfig.toml`:

```toml
[test]
preload = ["@flaky-tests/plugin-bun"]
```

Then run detection:

```sh
bunx @flaky-tests/core
```

See the [docs](https://brewpirate.github.io/flaky-tests/) for Vitest, Turso,
Supabase, and Postgres setups.

## Not in this release

- The `brewpirate/flaky-tests@v1` GitHub Action (`action.yml`) is still
  stubbed and is not yet usable. It is tracked as a release blocker for the
  next snapshot.
- The pending changeset `.changeset/eleven-snails-happen.md` was not
  consumed; the next versioned release will include or supersede it.

## Full per-package detail

For dependency-bump details and per-package commit references, see the
seven per-package releases linked in the table above.
